name: @opencoo/source-okf
description: SourceAdapter for Open Knowledge Format (OKF) v0.1 bundles — walks a local OKF bundle directory and emits each concept document (markdown + YAML frontmatter) as an 'okf-bundle' document. The engine routes these to the deterministic compileOkfConcept passthrough (no LLM); the markdown body round-trips byte-for-byte into the wiki.
